title: pelargonium × venustum
intro: Pelargonium × venustum, commonly known as the Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Geraniaceae family. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its essential oil, which contains geraniol, linalool, and citronellol, giving it antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × venustum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and essential oil infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
